title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
